steps.expected: Per-field validation error on invalid URL
steps.observed: Per-field error: 'Invalid URL format (must start with http:// or https://)' on first field. General error: 'At least 2 valid URLs are required for benchmark mode.'

steps.action: Fill both URLs with identical valid URL 'https://www.example.com'
steps.observed: Duplicate error: 'Duplicate URLs detected. Each URL must be unique.'

assertions.title: Post-submit navigates to BenchmarkPage

steps.action: Enable Benchmark Mode, fill 2 valid URLs, click Start benchmark
steps.observed: API returned 422 error: missing 'selected_scenarios' and 'selected_personas' fields. Page stayed on SubmitPage with error message.

steps.action: Root cause: Frontend sends 'scenarios'/'personas' but backend expects 'selected_scenarios'/'selected_personas'
steps.expected: Field names match between frontend and backend
steps.observed: CreateBenchmarkRequest type in frontend/src/api/types.ts uses 'scenarios' and 'personas' but backend schema (app/schemas/benchmark.py) expects 'selected_scenarios' and 'selected_personas'

steps.action: Verify API works with correct field names via curl
Navigate directly to BenchmarkPage for API-created benchmark
steps.observed: BenchmarkPage loads at /benchmarks/46b6c14d-f5b9-42ab-846d-57fff39007cf, shows 'Comparing 2 URLs', trust scores, scenario breakdown, unified summary

evidence.network: POST /api/benchmarks -> 422 (field name mismatch); Direct curl with correct fields -> 201
evidence.urlAssertion: Navigation to /benchmarks/{id} never occurs from UI due to API error. BenchmarkPage itself loads correctly when navigated to directly.

assertions.issues: BUG: Frontend CreateBenchmarkRequest sends field names 'scenarios' and 'personas' but backend CreateBenchmarkPayload expects 'selected_scenarios' and 'selected_personas'. This causes a 422 error on every benchmark submission from the UI. Fix: update frontend/src/api/types.ts CreateBenchmarkRequest to use 'selected_scenarios'/'selected_personas', and update SubmitPage.tsx to map the fields accordingly.

frictions.description: When submitting benchmark with duplicate URLs, a stale error message from a previous validation attempt ('At least 2 valid URLs are required') persists alongside the new duplicate error, because setError(null) is only called after validation passes, not at the start of startAudit()

blockers.description: Frontend-to-backend field name mismatch: CreateBenchmarkRequest uses 'scenarios'/'personas' but backend expects 'selected_scenarios'/'selected_personas'. All benchmark submissions from the UI fail with HTTP 422.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Verified API works with correct field names via curl (201 response). BenchmarkPage renders correctly when navigated to directly.

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 4 passed (VAL-BENCH-001, VAL-BENCH-002, VAL-BENCH-003, VAL-BENCH-004), 1 failed (VAL-BENCH-006: benchmark creation from UI fails due to frontend/backend field name mismatch — frontend sends 'scenarios'/'personas' but backend expects 'selected_scenarios'/'selected_personas').
